feat.name: Miracle Worker
feat.text: Your alchemical mastery can resuscitate the recently slain. You can administer a major or true elixir of life to a creature who has been dead for no more than 2 rounds. When you do, that creature is immediately returned to life with 1 Hit Point and becomes wounded 1.

traits.name: Alchemist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the alchemist class.

links.name: major or true elixir of life
links.alt: major or true elixir of life
